sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79777" key="paroristh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρορ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n79777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">encroacher</tr_>, Lemma to <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.209</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammian.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
